title: Create React VerificationChecklist TypeScript component with inline styles
job:
Create plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/VerificationChecklist.tsx

A React component that displays a verification report. Import VerificationReport and VerificationCheck from ../../worker/verification.

Show:
- Overall status badge (Passed=green, Failed=red, Partial=yellow, Pending=gray)
- List of checks with pass/fail/warning/skipped icons
- Each check shows name, status icon, and details
- Summary line
- If escalateToMike is true, show a highlighted banner: 'Needs your review: ' + escalationReason

Props: report: VerificationReport | null. If null, show 'No verification run yet' placeholder.

Use inline styles. TypeScript. Commit.
